data.title: Greene County Bancorp, Inc. Reports Record Fiscal Year 2026 Earnings, Achieves Highest Quarterly Net Income in Company History, and Earns National Top-Performing Bank Recognition
data.description: Catskill, New York, July 23, 2026 - Greene County Bancorp, Inc. announced their financial results for the quarter and fiscal year ending on June 30, 2026. The company, which oversees Bank of Greene County and Greene County Commercial Bank, disclosed a net income of $11.3 million for the quarter, translating to $0.67 per basic and diluted share. For the entire fiscal year, the net income stood at $41.0 million, equating to $2.41 per basic and diluted share. In comparison, the figures for the same periods in 2025 were $9.3 million (quarter) and $31.1 million (fiscal year), with earnings per share at $0.55 and $1.83, respectively. This marks a significant 31.7% increase in net income, amounting to $9.9 million when contrasting the fiscal years ending on June 30, 2026 and 2025.

data.title: NovoMed PARTNERS Officially Launches to Build the Next Generation of Transformative Medical Technology Companies
data.description: A new healthcare innovation and growth platform called NovoMed PARTNERS has been officially launched in Newport Beach, California. Founded by Ramin Mousavi, former CEO of CathWorks, along with co-founders Mike Feher, Fabian Ngo, and Natalie Sickler, the platform aims to revolutionize the healthcare industry. The executive leadership team has extensive experience in building medical technology companies. NovoMed PARTNERS offers a unique perspective with a team that has a combined experience of several decades in the industry.

data.title: Nuclear Innovator Deep Isolation Selected by DOE for Three Project GENESIS Initiatives Advancing AI-Driven Nuclear Waste Research
data.description: Deep Isolation has partnered with Lawrence Berkeley National Laboratory and the University of South Carolina on three DOE Project GENESIS awards. The collaboration aims to hasten AI-assisted repository selection, design, and analysis for nuclear waste disposal. This initiative reflects a significant step in leveraging advanced technology for addressing nuclear waste management challenges.

data.title: Middlefield Short Duration Bond Plus ETF Distributions
data.description: Toronto, on July 23rd, 2026 - The Middlefield Short Duration Bond Plus ETF (TSX: MSBP) has disclosed the distribution details for the upcoming quarter. Unitholders of the fund will receive payments for the third quarter of 2026.

data.title: Susan G. Komen® to Deliver Urgent Message at Second Annual October Party in Pink Event: “Ending Deaths from Breast Cancer is Within Our Grasp; Together We Will Make it Happen”
data.description: In New York, Susan G. Komen®, the top breast cancer organization globally, is intensifying efforts to eliminate breast cancer deaths. Supporters will gather at the second annual Party in Pink in NYC on October 14th. The event is crucial for corporate leaders and philanthropists to provide essential support for those battling breast cancer. In the U.S. this year, approximately 321,910 women and 2,670 men are expected to receive a diagnosis.

data.title: U.S. Bank and GENYOUth Team Up to Expand Access to Flag Football in Schools and Communities
data.description: In Minneapolis, U.S. Bank revealed a fresh collaboration with national nonprofit GENYOUth, alongside the National Football League, to boost access to flag football for youth nationwide. The partnership amounts to $250,000 and aims to enable more students to engage in sports, fostering skills like confidence and teamwork, while promoting lifelong wellness benefits. GENYOUth focuses on enhancing the well-being of schoolchildren by advocating for healthy eating and physical activity.

On the Pokrovsk direction, Russian forces significantly outnumber Ukrainian troops in certain areas - Pavenko.

data.title: Proximie Builds the Next Generation of Surgical Intelligence
data.description: A partnership agreement has been signed between Proximie and UC San Diego Health, a prominent academic medical center in the United States. The agreement will see the deployment of Proximie's Intelligence Suite in 44 operating rooms and procedure rooms spread across four hospital sites. This move marks one of Proximie's largest deployments in the Americas. The collaboration designates UC San Diego Health as a key partner in the development of clinical, technical, and operational aspects of the Proximie system.

data.title: Mastercard Expands Virtual Card Platform with New Security Controls, Embedded Payments Network and Single API Access
data.description: In Purchase, New York, Mastercard has unveiled several upgrades to its virtual card number platform, aiming to enhance capability and control. The announcement includes significant improvements to the platform's features and functionalities.

data.title: Nexstar Announces Completion of ATSC 3.0 Transition in Cleveland, Marking Upgrade in Final Major U.S. Market
data.description: Nexstar Media Group, Inc. declared the successful implementation of ATSC 3.0 (NextGen TV) in Cleveland, Ohio, marking it as the final of the top 25 U.S. designated market areas (DMAs) to adopt the new broadcast standard. Cleveland faced challenges due to limited broadcast spectrum and station involvement, hindering the launch. With this milestone, ATSC 3.0 is now operational in all major markets. Nexstar, listed on NASDAQ as NXST, achieved this significant milestone today in Ohio.

data.title: Convey Honored for Technology Excellence in the 2026 Stevie® Awards
data.description: In Denver, Convey, the engagement operating system for utilities and regulated industries, has won a Gold Stevie® Award in the Technology Breakthrough of the Year category in the third annual Stevie® Awards for Technology Excellence. Additionally, Convey's CEO, Maulik Datanwala, received a Bronze Stevie® Award for Executive of the Year. This recognition highlights his leadership in expanding Convey into a technology organization catered towards utilities and regulated industries.

data.title: Grant Thornton expands technology leadership team
data.description: In Chicago, Grant Thornton, a major provider of audit, assurance, tax, and advisory services in the U.S., has bolstered its technology leadership team with key hires. Among these additions are Salman Taherian, who will lead the AI division, Tom Coulis as head of transformation, and Justin Corona as the new Chief Technology Officer (CTO). These individuals are pivotal in driving Grant Thornton's technology upgrade initiatives, integrating AI throughout the organization, and facilitating the company's technological advancement.

data.title: FinTurk Expands AI-First CRM With FormFiller™ and CashSweep™ Automation Tools for Financial Advisors
data.description: Today in Chicago, FinTurk, an AI-focused CRM for financial advisors, unveiled FormFiller™ and CashSweep™, two innovative workflow automation tools aimed at streamlining client paperwork and cash management for RIAs. These tools, integrated into FinTurk's AI platform, automate key operational tasks for advisors, enhancing efficiency and enabling firms to lessen administrative workload. The introduction of these tools signifies FinTurk's commitment to enhancing productivity and effectiveness within the financial advisory sector.

data.title: Deep Genomics Appoints Thong Q. Le as Chair of the Board of Directors
data.description: Deep Genomics, a TechBio organization based in Cambridge, Mass., and Toronto, has named Thong Q. Le as the new Chair of its Board of Directors. The appointment of Le, who joined the Board in 2025, was announced by Brendan Frey, the Founder and Chief Innovation Officer of Deep Genomics. Le is recognized for his expertise and support for the company's vision. Deep Genomics is known for its AI-first approach to genomic medicines and its groundbreaking AI platform model.

data.title: Middlefield Global Infrastructure Dividend ETF Distributions
data.description: On July 23, 2026, the Middlefield Global Infrastructure Dividend ETF (TSX: MINF) disclosed its distribution details for the third quarter of 2026. Unitholders of the Fund can expect payments as per the schedule outlined by the ETF.

data.title: Sharp to Showcase Its Most Comprehensive Production Print Portfolio Yet at PRINTING United Expo 2026
data.description: At Booth N6960, attendees will have the exclusive opportunity to preview the latest advancements in production print technology, an increased network of partners, and Sharp's comprehensive line of digital production presses. The event will take place in Montvale, New Jersey, starting on July 23, 2026. This announcement comes from Sharp Imaging and Information Company of America (SIICA), which is a division of Sharp.

data.title: Ondo Finance's Oasis Pro Markets Secures FINRA Authorizations to Offer Broad Range of Tokenized Equities and Funds to U.S. Investors
data.description: Ondo Finance has received new authorizations from FINRA to introduce regulated markets and services for tokenized securities in the United States. This initiative will be overseen by the SEC and FINRA. The announcement was made in New York on July 23, 2026. Ondo's SEC-registered broker-dealer subsidiary is set to launch these services, marking a significant advancement in the sector.
